content:
<action>
<tool>graph.plan</tool>
<objective>Create a long novel with structured settings</objective>
<constraints>Maintain structured settings (world-building, characters, plot points) as a foundation for the narrative; ensure scalability for a long novel; avoid plot holes through consistent documentation.</constraints>
<assumptions>The user wants a high-level structure before detailed writing; the setting is complex enough to require dedicated documentation.</assumptions>
<risks>Scope creep; loss of consistency in a long novel; overwhelming complexity in the initial planning phase.</risks>
<steps>1. Define the core genre and premise. 2. Establish the world-building framework (geography, magic/tech systems, history). 3. Develop key character profiles. 4. Outline the primary plot arcs (beginning, middle, end). 5. Create a structured directory for the novel and its supporting documentation.</steps>
<checks>Verify setting consistency; verify character motivations; verify plot coherence.</checks>
<paths>stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/settings/, stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/characters/, stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/plot/, stories/long-novel-with-structured-settings/manuscript/</paths>
<reason>The owner wants to create a long novel. To ensure quality and consistency, a structured approach is required, starting with a comprehensive plan that covers setting, characters, and plot.</reason>
</action>
